calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-03-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioners: Fu Hua Wang and Guohua Huang, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Hui Yu Huang, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Kelly Huang.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-21-2007 Reset To Jul-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Fu Hua Wang, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Hui Yu Huang.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to July 3, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for appearance of Minor's Father at the hearing.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
